# This README is auto-generated by AI


## BSD Resources Repository
A collection of resources for the BSD family of operating systems.


## Table of Contents
- [Cloud Providers](#cloud-providers)
- [Sites](#sites)
- [Operating Systems](#operating-systems)
- [YouTube Channels](#youtube-channels)


## Cloud Providers
* AWS Lightsail: [https://aws.amazon.com/lightsail](https://aws.amazon.com/lightsail) (FreeBSD 15.0, 14.3, and 13.5, verified on 31 March 2026)
* Hawk Host: [https://www.hawkhost.com](https://www.hawkhost.com) (FreeBSD 14 and 13, verified on 31 March 2026)
* Server Space: [https://serverspace.io](https://serverspace.io) (FreeBSD 14, verified on 31 March 2026)
* Vultr: [https://www.vultr.com](https://www.vultr.com) (FreeBSD 15, 14, and 13, as well as OpenBSD 7.8 and 7.7, verified on 31 March 2026)


## Sites
* vermaden: [https://vermaden.wordpress.com](https://vermaden.wordpress.com)


## Operating Systems
* DragonFly BSD: [https://www.dragonflybsd.org](https://www.dragonflybsd.org)
* FreeBSD: [https://www.freebsd.org](https://www.freebsd.org) (Runs smoothly on VirtualBox and is beginner-friendly)
* GhostBSD: [https://www.ghostbsd.org](https://www.ghostbsd.org)
* helloSystem: [https://github.com/helloSystem/hello](https://github.com/helloSystem/hello)
* MidnightBSD: [https://www.midnightbsd.org](https://www.midnightbsd.org)
* NetBSD: [https://www.netbsd.org](https://www.netbsd.org) (Runs smoothly on VirtualBox and is beginner-friendly)
* NomadBSD: [https://nomadbsd.org](https://nomadbsd.org)
* OpenBSD: [https://www.openbsd.org](https://www.openbsd.org) (Tends to run slowly on VirtualBox; however, it remains beginner-friendly)
